---
toc: false
page-layout: article
comments: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

library(rmarkdown)

# Dosyaları bul
files <- list.files("posts", pattern = "\\.qmd$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)

if (length(files) > 0) {
  # Verileri çek
  posts_data <- lapply(files, function(f) {
    meta <- rmarkdown::yaml_front_matter(f)
    date_val <- if (!is.null(meta$date)) as.Date(meta$date) else as.Date("1970-01-01")
    # Link düzeltme
    path <- gsub("\\.qmd$", ".html", f)
    list(title = meta$title, date = date_val, path = path)
  })

  # Sırala
  posts_data <- posts_data[order(sapply(posts_data, function(x) x$date), decreasing = TRUE)]

  # Bas
  tr_months <- c("Oca", "Şub", "Mar", "Nis", "May", "Haz", "Tem", "Ağu", "Eyl", "Eki", "Kas", "Ara")
  
  cat('<div class="blog-list">')
  for (post in posts_data) {
    d <- as.POSIXlt(post$date)
    date_str <- paste(d$mday, tr_months[d$mon + 1], d$year + 1900)
    cat(sprintf(
      '<div class="blog-post"><div class="blog-date">%s</div><div class="blog-title"><a href="%s">%s</a></div></div>', 
      date_str, post$path, post$title
    ))
  }
  cat('</div>')
} else {
  cat("Yazı bulunamadı.")
}
```
